metadata.description: The Enterprise Architecture Governance Harness for Claude Code

plugins.name: arckit
plugins.description: 73 slash commands across strategy, architecture, delivery, and assurance — including UK Government compliance

plugins.name: arckit-uae
plugins.description: UAE Federal Overlay — 12 commands for PDPL, IAS, AI Charter, autonomy, sovereign cloud, UAE Pass

plugins.name: arckit-fr
plugins.description: French Public Sector Overlay — 12 commands for DINUM, ANSSI, RGPD/CNIL, EBIOS, PSSI, SecNumCloud

plugins.name: arckit-ca
plugins.description: Canadian Federal Overlay — 12 commands for AIA, ATIP, ITSG-33, GC Digital Standards, OCAP, OLA

plugins.name: arckit-eu
plugins.description: EU Overlay — 7 commands for GDPR, AI Act, DSA, DORA, Data Act, NIS2, and CRA

plugins.name: arckit-at
plugins.description: Austrian Overlay — 3 commands for DSG/DSGVO, NISG, and Bundesvergabegesetz public procurement

plugins.name: arckit-au
plugins.description: Australian Federal Overlay — 10 commands for ASD Essential Eight, ISM, DTA DSS, Privacy Act 1988, OAIC NDB, PSPF, AI Assurance, DISP attestation, OT security, and SOCI/CIRMP

plugins.name: arckit-au-energy
plugins.description: Australian Energy Sector Overlay — 2 commands for AESCSF maturity assessment and energy-sector compliance (AER ring-fencing, AEMC NER/NGR, AEMO interfaces, DERMS/DOE, CSIP-AUS, SOCI escalation). Recipe: au-energy. First Australian sector overlay; composes the arckit-au federal baseline. Requires arckit and arckit-au.

plugins.name: arckit-us
plugins.description: USA Federal Civilian Overlay — 10 commands for FedRAMP, FISMA/NIST 800-53, CISA Zero Trust, OMB M-19-17 ICAM, NIST AI RMF, OMB M-24-10/M-25-21 AI assurance, E-Gov §208 PIA, EO 14028 SBOM

plugins.name: arckit-uk-finance
plugins.description: UK Financial Services Payments Overlay — 4 commands for established UK PSPs / EMIs / PIs: PSD2 SCA-RTS exemption design, EMI/PI safeguarding, FCA Consumer Duty board report, Critical Third Parties dependency assessment. Recipe: uk-fs-payments. First sector-specific overlay.

plugins.name: arckit-uk-nhs
plugins.description: UK NHS Clinical Safety Overlay — 4 commands for NHS DCB0129 (manufacturer), DCB0160 (deployer), DTAC v3, and UK/EU MDR SaMD/AIaMD classification. Adopts Marcus Baw SAFETY.md spec. Second sector-specific overlay.

plugins.name: arckit-fde
plugins.description: ArcKit FDE Site Generator — /arckit-fde:create interviews you and renders a brandable, GitHub-Pages-ready Forward Deploy Engineering consulting website to docs/. White-label brand, colour, pricing and contact; UK public sector or generic market preset. Claude Code only.

plugins.name: arckit-uk-gcloud
plugins.description: UK G-Cloud Supplier Bid-Authoring Overlay — 11 supplier-side commands driving a G-Cloud 14 Digital Marketplace submission end to end: supplier profile, service design, Service Definition Documents (Lots 1/2/3), supplier declaration, pricing, NCSC Cloud Security Principles assertions, competitor benchmark, submission review, and CCS submission packaging. Recipe: uk-gcloud-submission. Requires arckit core. Proprietary, experimental.
